texto: I feel like there’s a genuine hole in me. The little death, almost. I need stimulation. I used to need physical stimulation constantly, whether that be from listening to the sound of my own voice, or flirting with guys or girls. I’m not bisexual, but that moment when you realise someone likes you – it’s the best feeling in the world. If you could bottle it..
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Matt Healy: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I feel like there’s a genuine hole in me. The little death, almost. I need stimulation. I used to…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, love, sexuality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e sexuality.
